params.positive_prompt: minimal surreal editorial vertical still, anchor fragment: restrained documentary-surreal Hyatt Regency story plate, layered support fragments: institutional handoff scene and quiet wrong-state cue, historical anchor: routine-looking change moved through normal project channels, surreal breach: one ordinary institutional scene contains one wrong-state cue, one clear subject, negative space occupies at least 60% of the frame, off-center focal mass, one dominant field color, one saturated accent element, exactly one surreal breach, soft diffuse lighting, no text, logo, or ui artifacts
params.negative_prompt: no text, no words, no letters, no numbers, no digits, no stickers, no decals, no placards, no serial tags, no serial plates, no engraved plates, no warning signs, no warning plates, no stamped markings, no screen digits, no icon plates, no symbol plates, no interface readouts, no readable ui, no labels, no logos, no brand marks, no signage, no detailed faces, no gore, no bodies, no collapse reenactment, no disaster spectacle, no rods or nuts as the dominant subject

params.safe_zone_intent: keep the primary subject readable above the subtitle band; leave top UI band quiet
